title: TFC Electrical Appliances
body:
Electrical appliances extension for terrafirmacraft mod. 

Features:
Currently it only adds electrical refrigerator.
Electrical refrigerator vastly delays expiry date of food added by terrafirmacraft.
Refrigerator needs energy in order to work.
You can provide it with rf or gregtech eu energy.
You can turn off and turn on refrigerator using according button.

![Refrigerator GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2aa134e7bc06cb1786f86d3328851438bfa4068.png)

Other electrical appliances will be added in the future.

Required dependencies: TerraFirmaCraft.
